displayName.description: The user’s name as displayed in the user interface.

domainId.description: If not null, the Active Directory domain ID.

duoTwoFactor.description: Whether Duo two-factor authentication is enabled.

emailAddress.description: The user's email address. Used by the system to send reports, access requests, and other notifications.

enabled.description: Whether the user account is enabled. Disabled users are unable to log in and do not consume a user license.

fido2TwoFactor.description: Whether Duo two-factor authentication is enabled.

isApplicationAccount.description: Whether this is an application account. Application accounts are used for automation, cannot log in using the UI, and do not consume a user license.

oathTwoFactor.description: Whether OATH two-factor authentication is enabled.

password.description: The password used by local accounts to log in.

radiusTwoFactor.description: Whether RADIUS two-factor authentication is enabled.

userName.description: The unique string identifying this user.
